qualifying Fully Integrated Dual Eligible Special Needs Plans (FIDE SNPs). For FIDE SNPs to qualify for a frailty adjustment, they 
must have a similar level of frailty as PACE organizations. There is no frailty adjustment applied to the risk scores of long-term 
institutionalized beneficiaries or ESRD beneficiaries.25 

23 CMS. “HHS-Operated Risk Adjustment Methodology Meeting. Discussion Paper.” March 24, 2016. (Accessed 03/06/2026) 
24 CMS Risk Adjustment Methodology, December 2021.
